## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

- [ ] `make check` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] Updated docs where behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Small, focused PR
- [ ] No unrelated changes
- [ ] Ready for review
